title: clitoria falcata var. falcata
intro: Clitoria falcata var. falcata is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its distinctive leaflets and purple flowers. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Clitoria falcata var. falcata is often used to make teas, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
